title: Renovation of Old Town House building
description: GEORGE NEWS - The renovation of the Old Town...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The renovation of the Old Town House Building at 97 Market Street at the corner of Market & York Street, George will be between 23 February - 1 April 2024.


> Work will take place between 07:00 to 16:30 Mondays to Fridays. Renovations will include roof cleaning, painting and plumbing works.


It will be necessary to close off sections of the pedestrian walkways at several locations and several parking areas will form a part of the demarcated work zone to create a safe buffer zone for the duration of the project.

Public safety will be prioritised and to ensure that pedestrians move effectively around the work zone, they are requested to adhere to the signage, markers and signal devices installed.

Designated parking areas will not be open to motorists for the duration of the project.

The affected area. Image: Google Maps

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
